description: Refactor the legacy monolithic Flask application at /home/ga/legacy_project/ into a microservices architecture using Docker Compose. Split the existing single Dockerfile into two services: an 'app' service for the Flask application and a 'db' service using the postgres:15-alpine image. The 'app' service must connect to the 'db' service using the host 'db', user 'notes_user', password 'notes_password', and database 'notes_db'. Ensure the 'db' service uses a named volume for data persistence and the Flask application is accessible at http://localhost:5000.
